dataSource.loadQuery: SELECT PATIENT_ID, PATIENT_CODE, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME, DATE_OF_BIRTH, GENDER, PHONE_NUMBER, EMAIL, ADDRESS, IDENTITY_NUMBER, BLOOD_TYPE, ALLERGIES, INSURANCE_NUMBER, INSURANCE_PROVIDER, STATUS, CREATED_BY, CREATED_DATE FROM DEMO_PATIENTS WHERE PATIENT_ID = :id

regions.title: Thông tin y tế & bảo hiểm
